intro: Pycnarrhena lucida, also known as Yellow Pondsweed, is a perennial aquatic plant native to North America. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine to treat a variety of ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties.
